short_summary: El Niño confirmed, wildfire risk rises
rationale: El Niño officially declared this cycle is a direct and new development for Portugal, elevating wildfire and drought risk on the Iberian Peninsula in the coming months.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: El Niño officially confirmed by scientists; Portugal faces elevated wildfire, drought and extreme heat risk this season — a direct and tangible threat to lives, property and the tourism economy.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: Ongoing World Bank warning; Portugal's tourism and energy-import economy remains vulnerable to global downturn, but no new escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: Gold is now the top reserve asset — is dollar dominance at risk?
top_events.summary: Continued shift in global reserve assets; long-term financial system implications for EU economies including Portugal, but no immediate daily-life impact.
